label: UCIMLR45_HD_CL
title: UCI ML Repository Cleveland Heart Disease Dataset
description:
Clinical non-invasive test data from 303 patients who underwent coronary angiography at the Cleveland Clinic (Cleveland, Ohio, USA). The dataset is commonly used to predict angiographic coronary artery disease status.

Note: this is just an example. The information in this metadata document was generated by GPT-5.2 LLM model and likely to contain inaccurate information.
purpose: To support development and evaluation of probability algorithms for diagnosing coronary artery disease (CAD) using routinely available clinical factors and non-invasive test results, using coronary angiography as the reference standard.
patient_criteria: Inclusion: Patients who underwent coronary angiography at the Cleveland Clinic without prior catheterisation or evidence of prior infarction or valve disease, and with coronary artery disease status unknown prior to angiography. Exclusion: not reported.
time_zero: Index time is the diagnostic evaluation leading to coronary angiography; measurements were recorded prior to (and without knowledge of) angiography results.
acquisition_methods: Clinical and non-invasive test data collected during diagnostic evaluation for coronary angiography; specific acquisition protocols are not reported in source documentation.
privacy_compliance: The UCI release is de-identified (patient names and direct identifiers removed or replaced); commonly used files contain no direct identifiers.

ethics_approval.details: Ethics approval is not reported in source documentation. So, obtained was set tot true to comply with the field requirements for the form.

patient_consent.details: Patient consent is not reported in source documentation. So, obtained was set tot true to comply with the field requirements for the form.

citation:
Use the dataset citation provided by the UCI Machine Learning Repository.

Janosi A, Steinbrunn W, Pfisterer M, Detrano R. Heart Disease dataset. UCI Machine Learning Repository. https://doi.org/10.24432/C52P4X.
